MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, City Housing, Inc. and Defendant, James McNeeley appeared in pro per. The Case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
